headline: Partners Group Realises atNorth Value While Retaining AI Data Center Upside
summary: Partners Group Holding (SWX:PGHN) has agreed to sell Nordic data center operator atNorth to CPP Investments and Equinix. The firm will keep a minority stake in atNorth, maintaining exposure to data center demand linked to AI computing needs. The deal reflects ongoing investor interest in large scale data center platforms serving AI and cloud workloads. Partners Group Holding enters this transaction with its shares at CHF857.4 and a mixed return profile, including a 0.9% gain over the past 7...

headline: Spain Colocation Data Center Portfolio Report 2026: Detailed Analysis of 65 Existing Data Centersand 51 Upcoming Data Centers with Merlin Properties, Digital Realty,Equinix and Nabiax Leading
summary: Explore Spain's booming data center market with our comprehensive database, offering insights into 65 existing and 51 upcoming colocation facilities across key cities including Madrid, Barcelona, and Valencia. Uncover detailed analyses, covering aspects like white-floor space, IT load capacity, and retail/wholesale pricing. See how dominant operators like Digital Realty and Equinix are transforming the sector, with Madrid at the epicenter of growth. Essential for REITs, contractors, and advisors

headline: Ireland Colocation Data Center Portfolio Report 2026: Detailed Analysis of 35 Existing Data Centers and 23 Upcoming Data Centers with EdgeConneX, Echelon, Equinix and Digital Realty Leading
summary: Explore Ireland's dynamic data center market with our comprehensive Excel database, featuring insights on 35 existing and 23 upcoming colocation data centers across key locations including Dublin, Cork, and Belfast. Gain access to detailed analytics on white-floor space, IT load capacity, and retail and wholesale colocation pricing. Discover the prominence of major operators like EdgeConneX and Equinix, and the significant future capacity additions led by Echelon Data Centres. Tailored for data

headline: Equinix & CPP Investments to Buy atNorth & Expand Data Center Footprint
summary: EQIX teams up with CPP Investments to buy atNorth for $4.2B, boosting its Nordic data center footprint and immediately lifting AFFO per share upon transaction closure.
